targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT * FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), prev AS (SELECT * FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) SELECT (SELECT mv_delta FROM latest) - (SELECT mv_delta FROM prev) AS value

targets.queryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, mv_delta AS MVDelta, monthly_income_delta AS IncomeDelta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, mv_delta AS MVDelta, monthly_income_delta AS IncomeDelta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date

targets.queryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_period_pct AS TWR, ltv_pct_delta AS LTVDelta, forward_12m_delta AS F12Delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (period_end_date || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_period_pct AS TWR, ltv_pct_delta AS LTVDelta, forward_12m_delta AS F12Delta FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(market_value_delta,2) AS MVDelta, round(weight_delta_pct,3) AS WtDelta, substr(change_type,1,10) AS ChgType FROM period_holding_changes WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY abs(market_value_delta) DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(market_value_delta,2) AS MVDelta, round(weight_delta_pct,3) AS WtDelta, substr(change_type,1,10) AS ChgType FROM period_holding_changes WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY abs(market_value_delta) DESC LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT * FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), prev AS (SELECT * FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) SELECT 'current' AS Which, (SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date FROM latest) AS Range, round((SELECT mv_delta FROM latest),2) AS MVDelta, round((SELECT twr_period_pct FROM latest),2) AS TWR UNION ALL SELECT 'previous' AS Which, (SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date FROM prev) AS Range, round((SELECT mv_delta FROM prev),2) AS MVDelta, round((SELECT twr_period_pct FROM prev),2) AS TWR LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT * FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), prev AS (SELECT * FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) SELECT 'current' AS Which, (SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date FROM latest) AS Range, round((SELECT mv_delta FROM latest),2) AS MVDelta, round((SELECT twr_period_pct FROM latest),2) AS TWR UNION ALL SELECT 'previous' AS Which, (SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date FROM prev) AS Range, round((SELECT mv_delta FROM prev),2) AS MVDelta, round((SELECT twr_period_pct FROM prev),2) AS TWR LIMIT 5
